subcodes.first_line: ...Qa’im-Maqamí is, in truth, the foremost servant of the Cause of the All-Merciful… As to the verses concerning Dhu’l-Qarnayn, these are of the ambiguous sort that have an inner meaning. The objectors made this account a snare of deceit
subcodes.first_line_orig: مسئله عزير عليه السّلام حقيقتش اينست که مقصود ملّت حضرت موسی بود که به هجوم بخت‌النّصر
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Imam 'Ali, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
